Exs. 1-3 were found in the courtyard of the Asšur tem- ple; the remaining exs. were found in various parts of the city or their provenance is unknown.
The brick inscription translated in Haller, Heilig- tümer p. 47 n. 93 (cf. Grayson, ARI 1 LXXVI 36) has
